description: Make independently-launched `claude` sessions in the same working dir aware of each other at the file grain — warn+ask on same-file edits via a PreToolUse hook + local claim registry. No coordinator/daemon. Hybrid pid/heartbeat liveness, claim-then-check ordering, recency rule, canonical-path keys, best-effort Bash heuristic, events.jsonl audit. Design-complete + Codex-reviewed; parked.
